Here Comes the Boom (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $45,290,318Details
International Box Office $27,948,940
Worldwide Box Office $73,239,258
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,411,046
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,773,356
Total $18,184,402
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the comedy Here Comes the Boom, former collegiate wrestler Scott Voss is a 42-year-old apathetic biology teacher in a failing high school. When cutbacks threaten to cancel the music program and lay off its teacher Scott begins to raise money by moonlighting as a mixed martial arts fighter. Everyone thinks Scott is crazy - most of all the school nurse, Bella - but in his quest, Scott gains something he never expected as he becomes a sensation that rallies the entire school.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,816,596 (26.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$42,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,014 opening theaters/3,014 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $67,996,164

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 12th, 2012 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 10th, 2012 (Wide) (Jamaica)
October 10th, 2012 (Wide) (Trinidad)
October 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Curacao)
October 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Suriname)
October 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Aruba)
Video Release: February 5th, 2013 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for bouts of MMA sports violence, some rude humor and language.
(Rating bulletin 2241, 9/19/2012)
Running Time: 104 minutes

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

In the comedy Here Comes the Boom, former collegiate wrestler Scott Voss is a 42-year-old apathetic biology teacher in a failing high school. When cutbacks threaten to cancel the music program and lay off its teacher Scott begins to raise money by moonlighting as a mixed martial arts fighter. Everyone thinks Scott is crazy - most of all the school nurse, Bella - but in his quest, Scott gains something he never expected as he becomes a sensation that rallies the entire school.

Opening Weekend:$11,816,596 (26.1% of total gross)
